contract.goal: Create the empty-but-loadable plugins/jelly-guild/ plugin so subsequent Phase 1.2 units (U2-U5) have a real target. U1 is scaffolding only — no agent bodies, mode contents, rubric contents, or template content.
acceptance_criteria: plugins/jelly-guild/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists with name 'jelly-guild' and a description capturing the three-axis (personality + domain + phase) subagent-propagation scope.

Directory skeletons present: agents/, modes/domains/, modes/phases/, rubrics/, templates/. Empty dirs preserved via .gitkeep. No cli/, bin/, or skills/ (jelly-guild is declarative content only — the CLI lives in jelly-loom, Phase 1.3).

npm test passes (937 tests; +0 — jelly-guild adds no test surface in this unit, but the existing parametric for-loop in marketplace-manifest.test.ts now exercises jelly-guild's marketplace + plugin.json shape).
rules_applied: PLAN.md § Phase 1.2 Exit drives the directory shape + dependency declaration.
Marketplace.json convention: dependencies declared at marketplace level (not per-plugin plugin.json), matching all existing plugins.
Pattern A for checkin lifecycle (complete checkin written once at unit end) per feedback_loom_phase_and_checkin_gaps memory.
Substrate-only unit → panel auto-derivation includes evaluator-contract-fit (always) + evaluator-test-unit (because plugins/commons/cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts changed).
disqualifiers: Adding any subagent files in plugins/jelly-guild/agents/ (U4 territory).
Adding any mode files in plugins/jelly-guild/modes/{domains,phases}/ (U2/U3 territory).
Adding any rubric files (U2 territory — they pair with domain modes).
Introducing a cli/ or bin/ directory — jelly-guild has no CLI per PLAN.md decisions.

actions: Surveyed plugins/commons/ + plugins/guild/ layouts: plugin.json carries name+description (minimal). Marketplace.json carries source + dependencies at the marketplace level (not per-plugin).

Wrote plugins/jelly-guild/.claude-plugin/plugin.json — name 'jelly-guild' + description capturing three-axis decomposition (personality HOW + domain WHAT + phase WHEN) + Outcomes-grader-paired rubrics + @-import-composition CLAUDE.md template.
Created directory skeletons via .gitkeep: agents/ (U4 target), modes/domains/ (U2 target), modes/phases/ (U3 target), rubrics/ (U2 target — paired with domains), templates/ (U5 target).

Inserted jelly-guild entry in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json between linear-loom and ev — dependencies: ['commons']. Position puts it adjacent to linear-loom (the existing parallel-substrate slot) where future jelly-loom + jelly-run + jelly meta-bundle will also land.

Updated plugins/commons/cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAMES to include 'jelly-guild' (position 6, between 'linear-loom' and 'ev'). One-line addition; the existing parametric for-loop auto-generates +10 assertions for the new plugin.

Verified: find plugins/jelly-guild -type f returns 6 files (1 plugin.json + 5 .gitkeep). npm test → 937 passed across 67 files (marketplace-manifest.test.ts: 90 passed, was 80 — +10 matches per-plugin assertion count). Panel (contract-fit + test-unit): both approved on first run; one advisory observation about plugin.json description naming U2-U5 specifics (noted; consistent with guild's existing description convention).

changes_since_previous: First unit of Phase 1.2 (jelly-guild substrate). Phase 1.1 closed via PR #53 (project-subdir CLAUDE.md probe; findings in RESEARCH.md). This unit carries substrate-state carry-overs from Phase 1.1 close — projects/2026-05-25-jelly/events.jsonl (lagged pr-opened event from #53 + phase-completed event from `loom phase update jelly 1 --status=completed`) and projects/2026-05-25-jelly/manifest.json (Phase 1 → completed). These are substrate-state files, not artifacts — excluded from panel review.
notes_for_pr: Foundation-only unit. Plugin loads via marketplace but has no behavior surface yet. U2 (domain modes + rubrics) lands next.

Marketplace position: jelly-guild slots between linear-loom and ev. This adjoins linear-loom (the existing parallel-substrate slot) where future jelly-loom + jelly-run + jelly meta-bundle will also land, keeping the jelly family contiguous in marketplace.json.

Advisory observation from contract-fit panel (not flagged): plugin.json description names specific personalities + mode counts which is technically U2-U5 territory. Kept the detail because (a) guild's existing description follows the same convention (naming whiteboard-* / evaluator-* / generator-*), (b) plugin descriptions are user-facing index entries where component naming is conventional.

Substrate-state carry-overs from Phase 1.1 close: lagged pr-opened event + phase-completed event in events.jsonl, manifest.json's Phase 1 status update. Standard pattern per memory feedback_loom_pr_opened_orphan_and_guild_spec_path (pr-opened events lag the unit commit; carry into next unit).
Substrate gap reconfirmed: bin/guild derive-panel still returns 'panel-spec-unreadable (using fallback)' under the marketplace-installed CLI. Used node plugins/guild/cli/guild.ts locally throughout.

Phase 1.3 follow-up: the @-line management responsibility for the project-scoped CLAUDE.md template (from Phase 1.1's findings) gets picked up when Phase 1.3 ships `jelly plan`. Captured here so Phase 1.3's contract-negotiation surfaces it.
